# Architecture & I/O

## 1. Pipeline Workflow
아래는 파이프라인의 전체 실행 흐름도입니다.

::: {id="mermaid-lightbox" style="cursor: zoom-in; border: 1px solid #e3e6f0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; background-color: #fff; margin-bottom: 2rem;"}
```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    classDef default fill:#ffffff,stroke:#888,stroke-width:2px,color:#000,rx:5px,ry:5px;
    classDef proc fill:#e6e6e6,stroke:#999,stroke-width:1px,color:#000,rx:5px,ry:5px;
    
    linkStyle default stroke:#757575,stroke-width:2px;

    subgraph part1 ["Pre-processing"]
        direction TB
        fastqc ["Rawdata Quality Control (fastqc)"]
        fastp ["Trim adpater and remove low qual reads (fastp)"]
    end
    subgraph part2 ["Alignment and BAM Processing"]
        direction TB
        bwa_align ["Mapping (bwa_align)"]
        sort_and_index ["Sort and index (sort_and_index)"]
        gatk_dedup ["Remove duplicates (gatk_dedup)"]
        gatk_realign ["Realign (gatk_realign)"]
        gatk_bqsr ["Base Quality Score Recalibration (gatk_bqsr)"]
        samtools_filtering ["Remove low qualtiy read (samtools_filtering)"]
    end
    subgraph part3 ["Analysis"]
        direction TB
        copykit ["Calculate CNV (copykit)"]
    end
    subgraph part4 ["QC"]
        direction TB
        gatk_qc_artifacts ["Artifacts (gatk_qc_artifacts)"]
        picard_qc_insert_size ["Insert Size (picard_qc_insert_size)"]
        gatk_qc_alignment_summary ["Alignment Summary (gatk_qc_alignment_summary)"]
        gatk_qc_wgs_metrics ["WGS Metrics (gatk_qc_wgs_metrics)"]
        mosdepth_coverage ["Coverage (mosdepth_coverage)"]
    end

    data_fastq["Fastq"] --> fastqc
    data_fastq --> fastp
    fastp --> data_trimmed["Trimmed Fastq"]
    data_trimmed --> bwa_align
    bwa_align --> sort_and_index
    sort_and_index --> gatk_dedup
    gatk_dedup --> gatk_realign
    gatk_realign --> gatk_bqsr
    gatk_bqsr --> samtools_filtering
    samtools_filtering --> data_analysis_bam1["Analysis Bam"]
    data_analysis_bam1 --> copykit
    data_analysis_bam1 --> gatk_qc_artifacts
    data_analysis_bam1 --> picard_qc_insert_size
    data_analysis_bam1 --> gatk_qc_alignment_summary
    data_analysis_bam1 --> gatk_qc_wgs_metrics
    data_analysis_bam1 --> mosdepth_coverage

        class fastqc proc;
        class fastp proc;
    style part1 fill:none,stroke:#b0bec5,stroke-width:2px;
        class bwa_align proc;
        class sort_and_index proc;
        class gatk_dedup proc;
        class gatk_realign proc;
        class gatk_bqsr proc;
        class samtools_filtering proc;
    style part2 fill:none,stroke:#b0bec5,stroke-width:2px;
        class copykit proc;
    style part3 fill:none,stroke:#b0bec5,stroke-width:2px;
        class gatk_qc_artifacts proc;
        class picard_qc_insert_size proc;
        class gatk_qc_alignment_summary proc;
        class gatk_qc_wgs_metrics proc;
        class mosdepth_coverage proc;
    style part4 fill:none,stroke:#b0bec5,stroke-width:2px;
```
:::

## 2. Repository Structure
파이프라인의 핵심 코드 및 테스트 환경 디렉토리 구조입니다.

<div class="card shadow-sm mb-4">
<div class="card-header bg-light">
<strong>📁 Source Directory</strong> (<code>/storage/home/jhkim/scripts/bioscript/pipeline/cbNIPT/v3.0.0</code>)
</div>
<div class="card-body" style="max-height: 350px; overflow-y: auto; overflow-x: auto; padding: 15px; background-color: #f8f9fa;">
<pre style="margin: 0; font-size: 0.85em; background: transparent; border: none;"><code>📂 manual
📄 run_pipeline.py
📂 scripts
  📄 run_bwa_picard_pe_align_merge.py
  📄 run_copykit_cbnipt_copynumber_analysis.py
  📄 run_fastp_picoplexgold_pe_trim_using_singularity.py
  📄 run_fastqc_singularity_pe_qc_extract.py
  📄 run_gatk3_indel_realign_using_singularity.py
  📄 run_gatk4_bqsr_using_singularity.py
  📄 run_gatk4_dedup_using_singularity.py
  📄 run_gatk4_qc_alignment_summary_using_singularity.py
  📄 run_gatk4_qc_artifacts_using_singularity.py
  📄 run_gatk4_qc_insert_size_using_singularity.py
  📄 run_gatk4_qc_wgs_metrics_using_singularity.py
  📄 run_mosdepth_singularity_coverage.py
  📄 run_multiqc_report_using_singularity.py
  📄 run_samtools_bam_sort_index.py
  📄 run_samtools_filter_bam.py
  📄 temp.py
📂 src
  📄 bio_script.egg-info
    📂 PKG-INFO
    📄 SOURCES.txt
    📄 dependency_links.txt
    📄 entry_points.txt
    📄 requires.txt
    📄 top_level.txt
  📂 bioscript
    📄 __init__.py
    📄 cli.py
    📂 core
      📄 executor.py
      📄 flags.py
      📄 pipeline.py
    📂 generator
      📄 factory.py
      📂 templates
        📄 bash.template.sh
        📄 nextflow.template.nf
        📄 python.template.py
        📄 snakemake.template.smk
      📄 writers.py
    📂 utils</code></pre>
</div>
</div>
